name: construction project managers processing 5–15 projects/month tool
description: For construction project managers processing 5–15 projects/month, inconsistent reporting causes project delays. We automate reporting instead of manual reporting through spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inconsistent reporting leads to project delays and miscommunication.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inconsistent reporting leads to project delays and miscommunication.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For construction project managers processing 5–15 projects/month, inconsistent reporting causes project delays. We automate reporting instead of manual reporting through spreadsheets.
